rulings.Case Title: TRUJILLO, MARY ANN, AS SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST TO et al VS. DURO DYNE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 11, 2018 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant Marcal Associates, LTD's motion for judgment on the pleadings is off calendar. Matter is moot, Defendant Marcal Associates dismissed from action on December 3, 2018. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:30a.m. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. If a tentative ruling is contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must bring the proposed order to the hearing. If a tentative ruling is not contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must either bring the proposed order to the hearing or submit it after the hearing in compliance with CRC 3.1312. = (503/CML)

rulings.Case Title: BRUCE HUBER ET AL VS. HONEYWELL INTERNATIONAL INC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Substituting Successor-In-Interest For Deceased Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 11, 2018 in Department 503, Line 2. Plaintiffs' motion for order substituted successor-in-interest for deceased plaintiff is granted. No opposition. Cindy Westlund shall be substituted as successor in interest for decedent Bruce Huber in place and stead of Beverley Huber. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:30a.m. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. If a tentative ruling is contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must bring the proposed order to the hearing. If a tentative ruling is not contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must either bring the proposed order to the hearing or submit it after the hearing in compliance with CRC 3.1312. = (503/CML)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN HAHN ET AL VS. JOHN CRANE INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendant New York Air Brakes Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 11, 2018 in Department 503, Line 3. Defendant New York Air Brake's motion for summary judgment is continued upon the Court's own motion to December 19, 2018 at 9:30 a.m. in department 503.
